prompt: Replace the current tumor region in the source image with the reference tumor texture, simulating a different tumor type while preserving location and size.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (source image). Replace the large, bright tumor region found in the patient's right cerebral hemisphere of image 1 with the texture and characteristics of the tumor shown in image 2 (reference image). Ensure the new tumor occupies the exact same location and maintains the original size as the tumor in image 1, thereby simulating a different tumor type.
objects: Tumor in the patient's right cerebral hemisphere (with texture and characteristics of tumor from image 2, in the location and size of the original tumor)
Large, bright tumor region from image 1 (should not be present)
